title: Mone Mone
desc: Shakuntala strives to support her family after her father's untimely death. Later, a man falls in love with her and makes her a promise.

title: Geet Sangeet
desc: Abandoning his affluent background, a man chases his musical dreams. However, he finds himself employed as a driver and becomes smitten with his boss's daughter.

title: Satya Mithya
desc: Worried to see his daughter Rita in low spirits, Mr Chowdhury decides to take her to Dhaka. There, he hires Raju, a responsible young man, whom Rita falls in love with.

title: Putrabadhu
desc: The members of a joint family go through various ups and downs in their lives and attempt to stay together despite all the odds stacked against them.

title: Baba Keno Chakar
desc: When Rajnarayan asks his son to help out with the expenses for his sister's wedding, he refuses. As a result, he is forced to go from pillar to post to make ends meet.
